use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF HYPERTENSION AND ANGINA PECTORIS

indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension
CARDIZEM LA is indicated for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure. Lowering blood pressure reduces
the risk of fatal and nonfatal cardiovascular events, primarily strokes and myocardial infarctions. These benefits have been
seen in controlled trials of antihyperten...

Cardizem LA is indicated for the treatment of hypertension. It may be used alone or in combination with
other antihypertensive medications.
Cardizem LA is indicated for the management of chronic stable angina.
